fault_hypothesis: The function uses a logical OR (`or`) on line 67 to merge the masks, but the specification requires a logical AND (`and`). This causes the merged mask to incorrectly keep positions where only one of the input masks is True.

constraints.intent: The value appended to the merged list must be the logical conjunction of the corresponding elements.

spec.expr: all(merged[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(merged)))

constraints.intent: At the end of each iteration, the merged list must be consistent with a logical AND operation.

spec.expr: all(__cbfl_result[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(mask_a)))

constraints.intent: The final returned mask must be the element-wise logical conjunction of the inputs.

spec.expr: all(merged__1[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(merged__1)))

constraints.intent: The partially built mask must be correct before appending the next element.
